grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/02บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json
raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. บัวปูนปั้น กว้าง 0.10 ม ลึก 0.10 ม. เซาะร่อง หรือฝังเส้น PVC (called out twice). ระแนงบังแดดเหล็ก ดูแบบขยาย (A-16). Grid callouts along the bottom, left to right: 1, 2, 3, 4, with dimension chain 1.00 (west overhang) | 3.20 | 3.20 | 3.20 (=9.60, grid1-4) | 1.00 (east overhang). Window callouts '1' (hexagon) over two openings, doors/windows at 2.15 and 2.45 m height.
description: Elevation 1 (รูปด้าน 1), a flat parapet-topped facade spanning grid 1 to grid 4, viewed from outside gridF (north side, matching the ซักล้าง/ครัว/นอน1/นอน2 wing). Shows a flat fascia/parapet band at the top with a plaster cornice (บัวปูนปั้น) detail and a steel sunshade lattice (ระแนงบังแดดเหล็ก, detailed on A-16) mounted above two window openings, a control-joint/PVC-strip reveal (เซาะร่อง/ฝังเส้น PVC) on the wall face at two positions, and two window openings (both tagged hexagon '1', heights 2.15m and 2.45m) with brick/plaster wall below. Level datum: ±0.00 (reference) to +0.60 (ground floor) to +3.75 (roof-beam level, ระดับหลังคาน).
warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): the 1.00/3.20/3.20/3.20/1.00 dimension chain on this elevation exactly matches the floor plan's x-axis grid (1=0.0,2=3.2,3=6.4,4=9.6) plus the 1.00m roof overhangs on both ends — fully consistent, no dummy grid needed.
This page (A-06) contains two elevations; the second (รูปด้าน 2) is in sibling file _หน้า08_elevation2.json.

The two window openings' heights (2.15m, 2.45m) are read directly off small diagonal dimension callouts on the elevation and are the same figures also visible in the door/window schedule (A-09) cross-section drawings — flagged as consistent but not independently re-verified pixel-by-pixel.

The exact door/window number under each hexagon tag ('1') could not be confidently cross-matched to a specific D/W schedule entry (A-09) at this resolution — see _หน้า11_door_window_schedule.json for the schedule itself.
